mode: lightweight DFT screening for expanded-retrain top-5 candidates

settings.clean_surface_energy_source: 01_relax final energy only when BFGS converged normally

strict_screening_rules: Only parse relaxed coordinates from an explicit ATOMIC_POSITIONS block inside Begin/End final coordinates.
Coordinate rows must be element symbol plus exactly three floating-point values.
Do not continue to SCF, H adsorption, or phonon when the clean relax reaches maximum steps without normal BFGS convergence.

candidates.name: candidate_01_VCSe
candidates.screening_conclusion: rejected: HER is improved versus earlier checked candidates but still positive, and large imaginary Gamma modes indicate dynamic instability

candidates.name: candidate_02_VCSe
candidates.screening_conclusion: rejected: clean relax did not converge normally; H adsorption and phonon were skipped by strict validation rules

candidates.name: candidate_03_VNSe
candidates.screening_conclusion: rejected: clean relax did not converge normally; H adsorption and phonon were skipped by strict validation rules

candidates.name: candidate_04_VSSe
candidates.screening_conclusion: rejected: HER is weak and large imaginary Gamma modes indicate dynamic instability

candidates.name: candidate_05_VNSe
candidates.screening_conclusion: rejected: clean relax oscillated near 0.0035 Ry/Bohr and did not converge normally; H adsorption and phonon were skipped by strict validation rules

summary: Expanded surrogate top-5 did not produce a candidate satisfying both near-zero HER adsorption free energy and Gamma-point dynamic stability. The real QE labels expose a surrogate-to-DFT gap and should be used as hard negative/active-learning feedback for the next training round.
